user.title: Connect to PiDP-11 add-on
user.description:
Point this integration at the PiDP-11 emulator add-on's remote-console port.

{secret_hint}

data_description.host: IP or hostname of the machine running the PiDP-11 add-on
data_description.remote_console_port: Port mapped to the add-on's authshim (default 2223)
data_description.shared_secret: Token from /share/pidp11/remote_console.secret or the add-on log

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the remote console.
error.invalid_auth: Shared secret rejected by the add-on.
